name: AI Telehealth Appointment Confirmation & Rescheduling Assistant

parameters.content:
## 🏥 Patient Appointment No-Show Prevention

### How it works
When a new appointment is booked via the n8n form, this workflow uses GPT-4o-mini to predict the patient's no-show risk based on their history, booking channel, insurance type, and appointment details. High-risk patients (score ≥ 70) receive escalating Telegram reminders, including a final confirmation prompt. Based on their reply, the workflow either confirms their slot in Google Calendar or cancels and opens the slot for waitlisted patients. Low-risk patients get a simple friendly reminder.

### Setup steps
1. Connect your **Telegram Bot** credentials (used for all patient messages)
2. Connect your **OpenAI** API key (GPT-4o-mini for risk scoring)
3. Connect your **Google Calendar** OAuth2 account for slot management
4. Update the form path and calendar ID to match your environment
5. Test with the pinned sample patient data before going live
6. Adjust the risk score threshold (default: 70) in the IF node if needed

## 📋 Intake & AI Risk Scoring
Collects appointment details from the booking form, then passes them to GPT-4o-mini to produce a 0–100 no-show risk score. The parsed score and patient data flow into the routing decision.

## 📣 High-Risk Outreach
Sends escalating Telegram messages: first a reminder, then a high-priority alert, then a final confirmation request. Waits up to 2 hours for the patient to respond before proceeding.

## 📅 Calendar & Slot Management
If the patient cancels, a reschedule slot is created in Google Calendar and the admin is notified of the freed-up slot. If they confirm, the original event is updated with a confirmation note.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Use named credential sets for Telegram Bot, OpenAI, and Google Calendar OAuth2. Never paste raw tokens into node fields. Replace all sample email/calendar IDs with your own before publishing.

values.placeholder: Paste Google Calendar Event ID if existing

parameters.formDescription: Please fill in the patient appointment details below.

options.systemMessage: You are a medical appointment no-show risk predictor. Always return valid JSON only — no extra text, no markdown fences, no code blocks.

parameters.message:
=📞 *Final Reminder — Action Required*

Dear {{ $('High Risk? (score >= 70)').item.json.patient['Patient Name'] }},

This is your final reminder for your appointment on * {{ $('High Risk? (score >= 70)').item.json.patient['Appointment Date'] }}* at * {{ $('High Risk? (score >= 70)').item.json.patient['Appointment Time'] }}*.

If you do not confirm, your slot may be given to another patient.

Reply *CONFIRM* or *CANCEL* now.

parameters.text:
=✅ *Reschedule Confirmed*

Hi  {{ $('High Risk? (score >= 70)').item.json.patient['Patient Name'] }}, your appointment has been cancelled and a new slot is being prepared for you.

Our team will contact you shortly to confirm your new appointment time.

Thank you for letting us know! 🙏

nodes.name: Telegram: Notify Admin of Free Slot
Google Calendar: Mark Event as Confirmed

updateFields.description:
=Patient confirmed attendance via Telegram automated outreach.
Patient: {{ $json.patient.patient_name }}

parameters.content:
## 🔀 Risk Routing
Splits patients into two tracks: high-risk (score ≥ 70) goes through escalated outreach; low-risk receives a single friendly reminder. Adjust the threshold in the IF node to tune sensitivity.

## ⚠️ Error Handler
Catches any failure across the entire workflow and immediately sends a Slack alert to the ops channel. Wire this to every sub-workflow or critical node to ensure no silent failures.

main.node: Google Calendar: Mark Event as Confirmed
Telegram: Notify Admin of Free Slot
